title: A Handle on Reality
lines: You press your weight against the heavy iron door at the end of the tunnel. It feels cold and solid, a stark contrast to the shifting shadows behind you.
Through the rusted keyhole, you see a sliver of violet sky. The Desert is just beyond this threshold, and it looks mercifully empty.
Your breathing slows as you prepare to step out into the open again.

options.desc: 1. Push the heavy door and step into the light
2. Listen for any scuttling behind you
